MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-12-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER EUN KIM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION FOR INSUFFICIENT INORMATION. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
